subject: feat(theme): add build script to auto-generate PWA meta theme-color hex
body:
Add scripts/generate-theme-meta.mjs that reads DaisyUI oklch theme
values and converts them to hex for PWA meta theme-color tags. The
script updates daisyuiThemes.ts metaColor values, index.html meta
tags, and the flash prevention script's metaColors object.

Light themes use --color-primary, dark themes use --color-base-100.
Conversion: oklch → oklab → LMS → linear sRGB → gamma sRGB → hex.
Script is idempotent — no writes when values are already correct.

Fixed incorrect pastel meta-color: #fdeef4 (wrong) → #e9d4ff (correct,
derived from pastel's oklch primary value).

Run: npm run generate:theme-meta (after DaisyUI updates or combo changes)

Tags: theme, build-script, pwa, meta-color, oklch
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
